name: aniline_logp_partition
prompt: Run the logp-partition task on aniline using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase. Report the logP partition coefficient (the dimensionless octanol-water log P) as the headline value (the logp-partition task also returns per-solvent solvation free energies and total energies — do NOT report those as the headline value), and state the method used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
